_comment: Real, publicly-licensed datasets only. URLs point to the source's own hosting — Prism never re-hosts or commits the downloaded bytes (see corpus_cache/, gitignored). Verified working as of the corpus build date; a source going stale over time is expected and handled gracefully by tools/corpus.py, not a Prism bug.

datasets.name: data.gov.in Crop Production (Karnataka)
datasets.notes: District-wise vegetable crop area/production/yield. Uses data.gov.in's own publicly-published anonymous trial API key (shown on every resource page, not a bypassed credential). Headers historically carry typos/trailing spaces.

datasets.name: data.gov.in Agri Market Prices
datasets.notes: Live daily mandi commodity prices. Headers carry raw x0020-encoded spaces.

datasets.name: data.gov.in Real-time Air Quality Index
datasets.notes: Hourly station-level pollutant readings across states/cities.

datasets.name: data.gov.in Census Sex Ratio and Growth Rate
datasets.notes: Census 2011 state/UT table — includes an 'India' aggregate row mixed in with individual states, a real wide-format/aggregate-row gotcha.

datasets.name: UCI Bank Marketing
datasets.notes: Nested zip (zip-of-zips). Semicolon-delimited, quoted string fields, 'unknown' placeholder category — a real banking-domain delimiter-sniffing test, standing in for RBI's DBIE portal which has no scriptable direct-download endpoint (JS-rendered, anti-bot on static exports).

datasets.name: UCI Adult Income
datasets.notes: Classic income-prediction dataset. adult.data ships with NO header row at all — a real 'missing header entirely' case distinct from multi-row/merged headers.

datasets.name: UCI Wine Quality (red)
datasets.notes: Semicolon-delimited, quoted headers — second independent delimiter-sniffing case from a different portal than Bank Marketing.

datasets.name: NYC 311 Service Requests (sample)
datasets.notes: Socrata API, row-limited via $limit so the sample stays small. ~29 columns, many optional/sparse fields (agency-dependent schema).

datasets.name: NYC Green Taxi Trips (sample)
datasets.notes: 2014 trip records, some null lat/lon — non-Indian format contrast.

datasets.name: France Elus Locaux (semicolon CSV)
datasets.notes: French government open data — semicolon-delimited, quoted fields, accented French text (encoding stress alongside the delimiter).

datasets.name: UCI Online Retail (latin-1 mojibake)
datasets.notes: The canonical Windows-1252-encoded retail dataset — cancellation-prefixed invoice IDs, negative-quantity returns, non-product StockCodes (POST/D/M/BANK CHARGES).
